base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of menu_game_start_password — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Main menu — 'GAME START / PASSWORD' options. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Main menu — 'GAME START / PASSWORD' options; ornate Simon's Quest banner
